items.title: Enhance Documentation UX with Language Selector and Clean API Titles in Docs 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the documentation user experience by implementing a language selector and cleaning up verbose API titles. Additionally, API references are now paired with relevant integration guides for better accessibility. These changes aim to streamline navigation and enhance clarity for users across multiple languages.

items.title: Updated favicon for a polished look in Docs 🎨
items.summary: The favicon for the documentation site has been updated to match the platform's favicon.ico, resolving previous logo display issues. This change enhances the visual consistency across the platform and improves user experience.

items.title: New MCP Guides for Flux, Seedance, Seedream, and ShortURL in Backend 🚀
items.summary: We've added comprehensive zh-CN MCP documentation for four new servers: Flux, Seedance, Seedream, and ShortURL. Each guide follows the established format and includes essential setup instructions and features. Additionally, Document objects and Translation entries have been created in the database to support these updates.

items.title: Update CI to Trigger Builds for Translations in Backend 🚀
items.summary: Modified the CI configuration to only ignore the Chinese documentation directory during deployment. This change ensures that translated documents will now trigger Docker builds, deployments, and database synchronization, improving the workflow for maintaining multilingual support.

items.title: Update environment variable for translation workflow in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update renames the environment variable from ACEDATACLOUD_API_TOKEN to ACEDATACLOUD_OPENAI_KEY in both the translate workflow and the associated script. The change ensures that the correct key is used for translation tasks, enhancing the functionality of the translation process.

items.title: Optimize CI by Excluding Docs from Deploy Triggers in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the CI configuration to exclude changes in the 'docs/' directory from triggering Docker builds and Kubernetes deployments. This adjustment ensures that documentation updates, such as translations and SEO content, do not unnecessarily initiate deployment processes, streamlining the workflow.

items.title: Streamline translation process by removing CronJob in Backend 🚀
items.summary: The translation CronJob YAML has been removed as translation is now managed through GitHub Actions. This change eliminates 65 lines of configuration, simplifying the deployment process and enhancing maintainability.

items.title: Revamp Translation Process with GitHub Actions in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on changes to the Chinese documentation, translating only the modified files. The old translation CronJob has been removed, and a new script for translating documents has been added. This change streamlines the translation process and enhances efficiency in managing documentation updates.

items.title: Revamped Documentation Structure for Multilingual Support in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update reorganizes the documentation into an internationalization (i18n) structure, moving files to language-specific directories. A total of 17 language translations have been exported from the database, and the sync script has been updated to ensure all languages are synchronized. This enhances accessibility and usability for a global audience.

items.title: Streamline SEO Content Sync in Docs 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the LLM-based SEO generation with a direct file copy from PlatformBackend, enhancing the efficiency of content management. The sync script has been modified to facilitate the transfer of pre-generated SEO content, ensuring that the latest materials are readily available. This change is expected to improve the accuracy and relevance of SEO resources in the documentation.

items.title: Boost SEO with Pre-Generated Content in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces 118 pre-generated Chinese SEO content files along with a deterministic template generator. These additions enhance the platform's capabilities for SEO optimization, providing developers with ready-to-use resources for better visibility and engagement. The structured content covers various AI topics, making it a valuable asset for users.

items.title: Enhance README with Badges and Formatting in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update adds PyPI version and download badges to the README, improving visibility for users. Additionally, markdown table columns have been aligned for consistent formatting, enhancing readability and presentation.

items.title: Enhance README with PyPI Badges and Table Formatting in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This update adds PyPI version and download badges to the README for better visibility of package status. Additionally, the markdown table columns have been aligned for consistent formatting, improving readability and presentation.

items.title: Enhanced README Table Formatting in M C P Veo ✨
items.summary: This update improves the readability of the README by aligning markdown table columns. A total of 55 changes were made, including 28 additions and 27 deletions, ensuring a more consistent format throughout the document. These enhancements will help users better understand the tools and their descriptions.

items.title: Enhanced README Formatting for Clarity in M C P Suno ✨
items.summary: This update improves the formatting of the README markdown tables, aligning columns for better readability. A total of 105 changes were made, enhancing the overall presentation of the documentation. These adjustments will help users navigate the information more easily.

items.title: Enhanced README Table Formatting in M C P Sora ✨
items.summary: This update improves the readability of the README by aligning markdown table columns. A total of 28 lines were added and 25 lines removed to achieve a cleaner and more consistent format. These changes enhance the overall presentation of the documentation, making it easier for users to navigate.

items.title: Enhanced README Table Formatting in M C P Serp ✨
items.summary: This update improves the readability of the README by aligning markdown table columns. A total of 92 changes were made, ensuring consistent formatting throughout the document. These enhancements will make it easier for users to navigate and understand the available search tools.

items.title: Enhanced README Formatting in M C P Nano Banana ✨
items.summary: This update improves the formatting of markdown tables in the README file, aligning columns for better readability. Key changes include adjustments to the layout of command arguments and descriptions, enhancing the overall presentation of the documentation.

items.title: Upgrade Django to 3.2.25 in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps Django from version 3.2.16 to 3.2.25, enhancing security and performance. Key fixes include addressing potential ReDoS vulnerabilities and improving the intcomma functionality for string floats. The changes will ensure a more robust backend experience.

items.title: Enhance Docs Sync Trigger for Cost Files in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update expands the sync-docs trigger to include additional cost file paths. Specifically, it now monitors changes in 'cost/service/**' and 'cost/api/**', ensuring that documentation stays up-to-date with cost-related modifications. This enhancement improves the accuracy and relevance of the documentation process.

items.title: Enhance Service API Mapping with Rich Data in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update enriches the service API mapping by adding display names, categories, and resolved aliases for each service. The changes allow the Docs sync to operate without hardcoded mappings, resulting in a more flexible and data-driven approach. All tests have passed successfully, ensuring stability and reliability.

items.title: Cleanup EPHONE_APP_KEY Fallback in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the fallback for the EPHONE_APP_KEY as the migration to the new API_KEY is complete. Key changes include modifications to settings.ts and five K8s deployment files, eliminating the old environment variable and ensuring the API_KEY is now mandatory. This streamlines the configuration and enhances security by removing transitional elements.

items.title: Standardize API Key Naming in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update renames `EPHONE_APP_KEY` to `API_KEY` across various components, including settings, handlers, and deployment configurations, aligning with the wcnb/cqtai convention. A fallback mechanism is implemented for a smooth transition, ensuring that both keys can coexist temporarily. This change enhances consistency and clarity in the codebase.

items.title: Automate Profile README Updates in .github 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an automated workflow for generating the profile README using live data from MCP servers. A new Python script and GitHub Actions workflow have been added, allowing the README to regenerate daily or on manual trigger. Simply update the MCP_SERVERS list to include new servers, and the README will be updated automatically.

items.title: Boosting Google Traffic with 83 New SEO Pages in Docs 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces 83 new English pages, including tutorials, comparisons, use cases, and blog articles, aimed at enhancing Google SEO traffic. A generator script was added, along with updates to the navigation in docs.json, significantly improving content accessibility and organization.

items.title: Automate Documentation Sync with GitHub Actions in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a GitHub Actions workflow that automatically triggers when specific files are modified in the main branch. It sends a sync-docs event to the AceDataCloud/Docs repository, ensuring that the Mintlify documentation site is always up to date. This enhancement streamlines the documentation process and improves efficiency.

items.title: Enhance README with PyPI Badges in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update adds PyPI version and monthly download count badges to the README file. These badges provide users with quick access to versioning and download statistics, enhancing the project's visibility and usability.

items.title: Enhance README with PyPI Badges in M C P Sora 🚀
items.summary: This update adds PyPI version and monthly download count badges to the README file. These badges will provide users with quick access to important package metrics, enhancing the visibility and credibility of the project.

items.title: Enhance README with PyPI Badges in M C P Veo 🎉
items.summary: This update adds PyPI version and monthly download count badges to the README file. These badges provide users with quick access to version information and download statistics, enhancing the project's visibility and usability.

items.title: Enhance README with PyPI Badges in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This update adds PyPI version and monthly download count badges to the README file. These enhancements provide users with quick access to versioning and download statistics, improving the overall visibility of the project.

items.title: Enhance README with PyPI Badges in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update adds PyPI version and monthly download count badges to the README file, improving the project's visibility and discoverability. These badges provide users with quick access to versioning and download statistics, enhancing the overall user experience.

items.title: Enhance README with PyPI Badges in M C P Serp 🎉
items.summary: This update adds PyPI version and monthly download count badges to the README file. These enhancements aim to improve the project's visibility and discoverability for users. The changes include two new badges that link directly to the PyPI project page.

items.title: Enhance README with PyPI Badges in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update adds PyPI version and monthly download count badges to the README file. These enhancements improve the project's visibility and make it easier for users to find relevant information about the package. Overall, this change aims to boost discoverability and user engagement.

items.title: Upgrade download-artifact to v8 in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the actions/download-artifact dependency from version 4 to 8. Key changes include improved handling of non-zipped downloads and stricter checks for hash mismatches, enhancing security and performance in artifact management workflows.

items.title: Upgrade Docker Login Action to Version 4 in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the Docker Login Action from version 2 to version 4, enhancing the workflow with new features and improvements. Key changes include switching to Node 24 as the default runtime and updating several dependencies, which will improve performance and security. The deployment workflow has been modified to reflect this upgrade.

items.title: Enhanced Security by Removing Hardcoded API Keys in Platform Service 🔒
items.summary: This update removes hardcoded API keys from checker configuration files and replaces them with Kubernetes secret-backed environment variables. Key changes include the addition of environment variable injection in the check.py file and the creation of a new K8s secret for xiaojingai. The deployment ensures no downtime as existing keys remain functional until the first sync occurs.

items.title: Automate i18n Translation on zh-CN Changes in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an automated workflow that triggers translation for the zh-CN i18n files whenever changes are pushed to the main branch. It requires the VITE_OPENAI_API_KEY and BOT_TOKEN secrets for operation. The new workflow enhances efficiency by ensuring translations are always up-to-date without manual intervention.

items.title: Enhance CI with Dependabot for Pip and Actions in M C P Sora 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot for managing dependencies in both pip and GitHub Actions, scheduled to run weekly. It allows for grouped updates, ensuring that minor and patch updates are handled efficiently. This enhancement will help maintain the project's dependencies up-to-date with minimal manual intervention.

items.title: Boosting Dependency Management in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot for pip and GitHub Actions, scheduled to run weekly. It will help manage dependencies more efficiently by grouping updates and limiting open pull requests. This enhancement aims to keep the project up-to-date with minimal manual intervention.

items.title: Automate Dependency Updates in M C P Serp 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot configuration for automated dependency management. It enables weekly checks for Python package updates and GitHub Actions version updates, ensuring that both ecosystems remain current with minimal manual intervention.

items.title: Automate Dependency Updates with Dependabot in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot configuration for the pip and GitHub Actions ecosystems. It enables weekly checks for Python dependency updates and GitHub Actions version updates, ensuring that minor and patch updates are automatically handled. This will help maintain the project's dependencies more efficiently and keep it up to date.

items.title: Automate Dependency Updates in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot configuration for automated dependency management in the PlatformGateway. It includes weekly checks for Python dependencies and GitHub Actions, ensuring that minor and patch updates are grouped into single pull requests. This enhancement will help maintain security and keep dependencies current without manual intervention.

items.title: Automate Dependency Updates in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot configuration for automated dependency management. It enables weekly checks for Python package updates and GitHub Actions version updates, ensuring that both ecosystems stay current with minimal manual intervention.

items.title: Automate Dependency Updates in Pay Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot configuration for the Pay Backend, enabling automated checks for Python dependencies and GitHub Actions. The pip ecosystem will receive weekly checks for minor and patch updates, while GitHub Actions will also be monitored for the same types of updates, ensuring the project stays up-to-date with minimal manual effort.

items.title: Automate Dependency Updates in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot configuration for the pip and GitHub Actions ecosystems. It enables weekly checks for Python dependency updates and GitHub Actions version updates, ensuring that security patches are applied promptly and dependencies remain current without manual tracking.

items.title: Enhance CI with Dependabot for Python and Actions in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot for managing dependencies in pip and GitHub Actions, scheduled to run weekly. It allows for grouped updates, ensuring that minor and patch updates are handled efficiently. This enhancement will help maintain the project's dependencies more effectively and keep the CI pipeline up to date.

items.title: Boost CI with Dependabot for Pip and Actions in M C P Veo 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot for managing dependencies in both pip and GitHub Actions, scheduled to run weekly. It allows for automatic updates of minor and patch versions, enhancing the project's maintenance and security. The configuration supports up to five open pull requests at a time, streamlining dependency management.

items.title: Automate i18n Translations in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new workflow that automatically translates i18n files whenever changes are made to the Chinese source files. It utilizes GPT-4o-mini to sync translations across all target languages, streamlining the localization process. Required secrets for the translation service and GitHub token have been specified for proper functionality.

items.title: Automate i18n Translation on zh-CN Changes in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an automated workflow that triggers translation updates whenever changes are made to the zh-CN files in the i18n directory. It utilizes GitHub Actions to run the translation process, requiring specific API keys for operation. This enhancement streamlines the localization process, ensuring timely updates to translations.

items.title: Enhance CI with Dependabot for Pip and Actions in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot for managing dependencies in both pip and GitHub Actions. It is configured to check for updates weekly, ensuring that minor and patch updates are automatically handled, which will help maintain the project's health and security.

items.title: Refactor Seedance Content Schema for Better Validation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update refactors the Seedance content items schema to utilize explicit oneOf branches with a discriminator for text and image_url types. This change enhances validation by preventing customers from submitting invalid payloads, ensuring each variant is clearly defined and adheres to the schema requirements.

items.title: Automate Dependency Updates in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot configuration for automated dependency management. It includes weekly checks for Python dependencies and GitHub Actions version updates, ensuring that minor and patch updates are grouped into a single pull request. This enhancement will help maintain security and keep dependencies up to date without manual intervention.

items.title: Fix rendering issues and enhance visibility in Status Page 🎨
items.summary: This update addresses two critical bugs in the status page frontend. It ensures that bars render correctly across different timezones by directly iterating over API data, eliminating key mismatches. Additionally, the no-data bars have been updated to a vibrant green color for better visibility on dark themes.

items.title: Enhance API Dropdown with Smooth Skeleton Loading in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update replaces the previous v-loading spinner with an el-skeleton animated placeholder for the API dropdown. The new skeleton matches the select height and provides a smoother user experience while APIs are loading. This change improves the visual appeal and usability of the API selection process.

items.title: Enhance Multi-Domain Profile Support in Auto Cert 🚀
items.summary: This update refactors `renew.py` to support multiple domain profiles, allowing for streamlined certificate management across different domain groups. Key changes include the introduction of a new `--profile` CLI flag, which enables users to specify profiles for certificate renewal, and the restructuring of certificate storage into per-profile subdirectories. The workflow remains unchanged, ensuring a smooth transition for existing users.

items.title: Fix TSE region and add CertSource for gateway cert update in Auto Cert 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves issues with the TSE gateway certificate update process. The default region has been corrected to 'ap-hongkong', and 'CertSource: "ssl"' has been added to ensure proper API behavior. Additionally, the domain filter has been refined to only include valid 'acedata.cloud' domains, enhancing security and functionality.

items.title: Fix EdgeOne Cert Update Logic in Auto Cert 🚀
items.summary: The EdgeOne certificate update process was malfunctioning due to the use of a non-existent field in the API response. This update replaces `DescribeHostsSetting` with `DescribeAccelerationDomains`, ensuring that all online acceleration domains are correctly identified and certificates are updated. Testing confirmed successful updates across multiple zones.

items.title: Fix K8S Secret Names and TSE Error Handling in Auto Cert 🚀
items.summary: This update corrects the K8S secret names from `KUBECONFIG_HK` and `KUBECONFIG_US` to `KUBE_CONFIG_HK` and `KUBE_CONFIG_SV`, aligning with the new cluster naming convention. Additionally, it enhances the error handling for TSE operations to prevent process failures when encountering resource not found errors. These changes improve the reliability and clarity of the deployment workflow.

items.title: Enhance API Dropdown Loading in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: The API dropdown in the Usage History page now fetches its options independently, improving user experience by displaying a loading indicator while data is being retrieved. This change allows the API list to load in parallel with applications, reducing wait times and enhancing overall performance. Key modifications were made in the List.vue file to implement these updates.

items.title: Enhance Footer with Service Status Link in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a 'Service Status' link to the platform footer, directing users to https://status.acedata.cloud. The link has been integrated into the 'Links' column of BottomFooter.vue, following the Privacy Policy. Additionally, an i18n key for the new link has been created, ensuring support for all 11 target languages.

items.title: Fix no-data bars to show gray instead of green in Status Page 🎨
items.summary: This update addresses the issue where services with major outages displayed all-green bar charts, misleading users about their operational status. The backend now assigns `uptime: null` for empty buckets, while the frontend renders these no-data slots in gray, enhancing clarity. Additionally, the date handling in the `getLastNDays()` function has been improved to prevent timezone mismatches.
